coverage.current_panel_window: 1960-01 through 2025-12 where monthly structural rows exist
coverage.training_history_window: 1960-1989 is now available for private training, calibration, priors, and long-run legacy feature engineering; earlier extensions remain possible if upstream sources are widened further
notes: Operational monitoring and public/internal live products should remain anchored to the 1990-present project window.
Earlier country-year structural history can still be used privately for training, calibration, priors, or long-run legacy features.
The current merged private panel now includes a structural training-history extension back to 1960 while preserving the live product boundary at 1990-present.
Pre-1990 history should not be mixed into live monthly monitoring as if it were part of the same operational event window.

external_pressure_sanctions_active.notes: Country-month estimate of active sanctions pressure.

external_pressure_sanctions_delta.notes: Month-on-month shock from sanctions tightening or easing.

external_pressure_imf_program_active.notes: IMF program presence or conditionality exposure.

external_pressure_imf_program_break.notes: Rupture, suspension, or high-friction IMF month.

external_pressure_us_security_shift.notes: Directional change in US security cooperation or pressure.

economic_fragility_inflation_stress.notes: Inflation stress signal for the month.

economic_fragility_debt_stress.notes: Debt-servicing or sovereign financing stress signal.

economic_policy_capital_controls_flag.notes: Capital controls or equivalent restrictive policy action.

economic_policy_nationalization_signal.notes: Nationalization, expropriation, or abrupt seizure-risk signal.

economic_policy_capital_controls_flag.notes: Country-month policy shock from capital controls or abrupt movement restrictions.

economic_policy_nationalization_signal.notes: Country-month signal of expropriation, nationalization, or seizure-risk escalation.
